jd_text: 💥Client Engagement Director💥 📍Dubai📍 💰 Salary on offer is Dh70,000-80,000 p/m 💰 Searchability MENA is partnered with a Global Tech Consultancy. They are looking for a Client Engagement Director to drive initiative on a large-scale to help the growth of their operations. This is a fantastic time to join the organization as it embarks on a period of hyperscale growth. You will be working with some of the major household names within the UAE Tech Scene. You will need to have worked for a leading consulting firm, given the scale of this role. 👀 Here's what they're looking for: 👀 Strong experience in aligning C-level stakeholders across multi-layered organisations. Deep understanding of product, engineering, and operations with a commercial mindset. Proven ability to manage contracts and oversee financial performance. Lead cross-functional teams to deliver complex projects end-to-end. Ability to work in a fast-paced, high-growth environment. 💰What's on offer:💰 Full Visa Sponsorship Family Medical Cover Performance-related Bonus Plus further benefits. Does this sound exactly like what you're looking for? Hit apply today, and we can discuss further. **Please note that only suitable candidates will be contacted for this position**
